title: The Dream of Oengus
description: The god of love sees a woman in a dream and searches all Ireland and the Otherworld to find her.
introduction: The god of love sees a woman in a dream and searches all Ireland and the Otherworld to find her.

translation.original_text: Boí Oengus adaig n-and ina chotlud, co n-acca ní, in n-ingin cucai.
translation.text: Oengus was asleep one night when he saw something — a maiden coming toward him.
